onComponentTokens.notes: Filled-variant text reads against component fill; ships from {role}-on-component derivation.

notes: Feedback-banner archetype: leading-accent banner with optional icon / title / body / close slots and dismissible motion. Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral each ship a full 8-var slot bundle (bg/fg/accent/border/icon-color/title-color/link-color/link-hover) plus per-variant overrides.

Four variants: default (soft container bg + accent bar), filled (solid role bg + on-component fg), outlined (transparent bg + role border), soft (container bg, no accent). data-role swaps the internal --_al-* chain to the matching slot rather than remapping --brand-*.
Three SIZES (small/base/large) — not the 10-density ladder. Sizes drive padding-x/y, gap, content-gap, font-size, title-font-size, icon-size, close-size simultaneously.
Info is a dedicated palette (blue), DISTINCT from brand. Alerts often need a 'tip' surface that doesn't read as brand identity.
Title is optional; when absent, alert becomes a single-line status. Close slot is optional via .alert__close + dismissing state.
